hyperedges.label: Wasm Clicker Polyglot Pattern
hyperedges.description: Seven Wasm clicker components share an identical template structure (surface panel clicker-card, assist-chip label, clicker-badge, clicker-value, md-filled-button with increment() handler) compiled from six different source languages (Zig, TinyGo, Tac, AssemblyScript, Rust, C) into WebAssembly, demonstrating Tachyon's polyglot Wasm component model.

hyperedges.label: Dashboard Page Composition
hyperedges.description: The dashboard page composes 9 child components across five semantic sections (Runtime, Data, Telemetry, Operations, Components) with a sidebar controlled by a logic:if directive, demonstrating Tachyon's hierarchical component composition model.

hyperedges.label: FYLO Database Ecosystem
hyperedges.description: FYLO is the database layer referenced across the app shell (via fylo-browser-path meta tag), the stats grid (Yon route handlers backed by FYLO), and documented in db/README.md with CHEX regex schemas, versioned schema layout, and seed data import via bun run seed.
